title: Feur Colors
description: Add variants of Wool, Terracotta and new color block
body:
![Feur Colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24066fa5321ed31f470ed1df91e9c1dcbbdea7d7.png)

This is a little project that add :

- Wool Slab
- Wool Stairs
- Wool Fence
- Terracotta Slab
- Terracotta Stairs
- Terracotta Wall
- New type of Glazed Terracotta 
- New type of Wool


~ and now new stuff ~
- Concrete Stairs
- Concrete Slabs
